entry.title: v0.16.3 – Update 0.16.3 [Berserker]
entry.summary: Rage skill not working on Berserker

entry.title: v0.13.0 – Shinobi Revamp [Berserker]
entry.summary: Berserker — Blood Frenzy: Aspd 50% → 30%, Siphon 100 → 50; Berserker — Berserk: added anti-flinch; Berserker — Shouts: now exclusive; Berserker — Rage: no longer drains from skill use; now stacks on skill use; shorter Enrage buff; reduced Rage gained from Enrage
